headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Edwards Lifesciences, Raises Price Target to $110
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Shagun Singh   maintains Edwards Lifesciences (NYSE:EW) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $100 to $110.
